title: Paper 24/7
body:
# **Paper 24/7 Plugin**
# 
A Minecraft plugin for Paper 1.21.5 that helps maintain server uptime 24/7 with automatic monitoring and restart capabilities.
Were not 100% sure if it works but now that's up to you to find out and test. Also were new to making plugins so we can only make it on paper.

****Works on Paper 1.21.5 and JDK 21****

## Commands

- `/paper247` - Shows plugin version information
- `/paper247 status` - Shows current server health status
- `/paper247 reload` - Reloads the configuration
- `/paper247 enable` - Enables server monitoring
- `/paper247 disable` - Disables server monitoring
- `/paper247 help` - Shows available commands
